sql_array: CREATE TABLE key_pairs (id INT PRIMARY KEY, access_key VARCHAR(100), sec_token VARCHAR(100), key_name VARCHAR(100), pub_key VARCHAR(100));

SELECT CASE WHEN DB.DBA.AMAZON_IMPORT_KEY_PAIR(access_key, key_name, encode_base64(cast(pub_key AS VARCHAR)), sec_token) IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE AND TRUE ELSE FALSE AND FALSE END AS import_result FROM key_pairs;

WITH key_import AS (SELECT pub_key, key_name FROM key_pairs WHERE access_key IS NOT NULL AND sec_token IS NOT NULL) SELECT encode_base64(CAST((SELECT pub_key FROM key_import WHERE key_name = 'my_key') AS VARCHAR)) AS encoded_pub_key;
SELECT TRUE AS result FROM key_pairs WHERE key_name = 'my_key' AND DB.DBA.AMAZON_IMPORT_KEY_PAIR(access_key, key_name, pub_key, sec_token) IS NULL;

SELECT * FROM key_pairs WHERE access_key IN (SELECT access_key FROM key_pairs WHERE sec_token IS NOT NULL AND DB.DBA.AMAZON_IMPORT_KEY_PAIR(access_key, key_name, pub_key, sec_token) IS NOT NULL) AND key_name LIKE '%key%';
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM key_pairs) AS total_keys, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM key_pairs WHERE pub_key IS NOT NULL) AS valid_keys WHERE total_keys > valid_keys;
UPDATE key_pairs SET pub_key = encode_base64(NULLIF(pub_key, '')) WHERE id = 1 AND DB.DBA.AMAZON_IMPORT_KEY_PAIR(access_key, key_name, pub_key, sec_token) IS NOT NULL;

SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(key_name ORDER BY id) AS concatenated_keys FROM key_pairs HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND COUNT(key_name) > 0 AND DB.DBA.AMAZON_IMPORT_KEY_PAIR(access_key, key_name, pub_key, sec_token) IS NOT NULL;
